## Codemotion

1. [Home](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en)
3. [Funds](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en/fondi/)
5. Codemotion

![Logo Codemotion](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/codemotion-logo-blu-orange.png)

- **Anno acquisizione:** 2023

- **Investment Type:** Venture Capital

**Codemotion** is a digital platform supporting the largest **developer community** in Europe, with over 250,000 active professionals.

It offers content and events focused on professional development and training, career opportunities, and networking, alongside a network of over 300 companies and startups seeking to recruit tech talent. In 2022, it launched **Codemotion Talent**, a matchmaking service that leverages a machine learning algorithm to create the 'perfect match' between professionals' career aspirations and the hiring needs of companies.

In February 2023, Codemotion completed an investment round of **€8 million**, led by **Sinergia Venture Fund**, with participation from both Italian and international partners, including Azimut Digitech Fund (with GELLIFY as advisor), Endeavor Catalyst, Primo Ventures, P101 with Italia 500, and CDP Venture Capital through the Fondo Rilancio Startup. This new capital increase brings the total funding raised by the company to €15.5 million. The investment enables Codemotion to strengthen the development of its platform and continue its growth trajectory.

- https://www.codemotion.com/

## Contents

1. [Home](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en)
3. [Funds](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en/fondi/)
5. Contents

![contents-logo](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/contents-logo.png)

- **Anno acquisizione:** 2021

- **Investment Type:** Venture Capital

**Contents.com** is a **SaaS** platform that leverages **artificial intelligence** to orchestrate the creation and management of **multilingual content** for medium and large enterprises.

Founded in **2020**, it quickly expanded its international presence, serving clients in **Europe**, **Latin America**, **North America**, and **Asia**. In **March 2021**, it closed a **Series A investment round** of **€5 million**, led by **Sinergia Venture Fund**, aimed at technological and commercial expansion.

In **January 2024**, Contents.com raised an additional **$16 million** in a **Series B round** led by **Sinergia Venture Fund** and **Thomson Reuters Ventures**, with the funds allocated to global expansion and technological enhancement.

The platform integrates advanced **language models** to generate **text**, **audio**, **video**, and **animations**, optimizing workflows and ensuring consistency with the brand identity. The mission of **Contents.com** is to revolutionize the creation of high-quality content globally, connecting ideas and cultures through **advanced AI-based solutions**.

- https://www.contents.com/

## Glickon

1. [Home](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en)
3. [Funds](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en/fondi/)
5. Glickon

![glickon_logo](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/glickon_logo-1024x305.png)

- **Anno acquisizione:** 2022

- **Investment Type:** Venture Capital

**Glickon** is a **data intelligence** platform that combines **artificial intelligence** and data analytics to optimize **talent acquisition**, **employee engagement**, and **organizational network analysis** processes.

Founded in 2014, Glickon has developed innovative solutions to enhance the candidate and employee experience, helping companies make informed talent decisions. The platform offers tools to create customized _surveys_, analyze _sentiment_, and map collaboration networks within the organization, identifying informal leaders and optimizing team synergies.

Glickon integrates with over 100 ATS and HCM systems, ensuring smooth implementation within existing HR infrastructures. Leading companies such as Generali Italia, Golden Goose, Deloitte, and KPMG rely on the platform to strengthen their _employer branding_ and boost employee _engagement_.

In May 2022, Glickon announced a **Series A investment round**, raising **€3 million** with **Sinergia Venture Fund** as lead investor. The capital increase was aimed at supporting the company’s expansion in Italy and abroad through the development of new solutions based on emerging technologies such as AI and big data.

Subsequently, in April 2023, Glickon acquired **Teamsight**, an Italian startup specializing in **people analytics**, to strengthen its position in the **talent intelligence** space. This transaction, strategically supported by Sinergia Venture Fund, enabled Glickon to offer advanced tools for analyzing skills, motivation, and relationships within organizations, enhancing both work quality and business outcomes.

- https://it.glickon.com/

## Ermes Browser Security

1. [Home](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en)
3. [Funds](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en/fondi/)
5. Ermes Browser Security

![](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/ermes-logo-1.png)

- **Anno acquisizione:** 2023

- **Investment Type:** Venture Capital

Ermes Cyber Security, founded in 2018 as a spin-off from the Polytechnic University of Turin, is an Italian scale-up specializing in the protection of corporate web browsing through solutions based on **artificial intelligence**. In June 2023, it closed the first tranche of a Series A investment round, raising €3.0 million with **Sinergia Venture Fund** as the lead investor. In December of the same year, the company raised an additional €4.5 million, with a significant contribution from Sinergia Venture Fund, joined by prominent angel investors.

The raised capital is intended to strengthen the company’s go-to-market strategy and reinforce research and development activities.

Ermes is the only Italian company selected by **Gartner** in the top 100 organizations using artificial intelligence to defend against cyberattacks.

Its technology protects over 30,000 users and is adopted by clients such as KPMG, Carrefour, and Reale Mutua.

- https://www.ermes.company/

## DHH

1. [Home](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en)
3. [Funds](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en/fondi/)
5. DHH

![DHH_logo](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/DHH_logo.webp)

- **Anno acquisizione:** 2024

- **Investment Type:** Private Investment in Public Equity

**DHH S.p.A.** (Dominion Hosting Holding) is an Italian company specializing in **cloud computing** and **hosting** services across the European market. Established in 2015, DHH has strengthened its market position through strategic acquisitions in Italy, Slovenia, Croatia, Serbia, and Switzerland. The company provides a comprehensive suite of solutions—from shared hosting to dedicated servers—supporting businesses of all sizes in managing their digital infrastructure. DHH is listed on the **Euronext Growth Milan** segment of Borsa Italiana under the ticker **[DHH](https://www.borsaitaliana.it/borsa/azioni/euronext-growth-milan/scheda/IT0005203622.html?lang=en)**.

In May 2024, the **PIPE** (Private Investment in Public Equity) fund managed by **Alkemia SGR**, in partnership with **Amber Capital Italia SGR**, acquired a 4.73% stake in DHH. This strategic partnership is aimed at supporting DHH’s growth and expansion within the technology sector.

DHH continues to invest in the expansion of its services and organic growth, aiming to become a benchmark in the European cloud computing landscape.

- https://www.dhh.international/

# Circle, Alkemia Capital entra nel capitale per accelerare il piano al 2029

Alkemia – attraverso il fondo PIPE – è entrata nel capitale di Circle Group con l’obiettivo di sostenerne e accelerarne il piano di sviluppo al 2029. L’operazione rafforza il percorso di crescita della società, attiva nella digitalizzazione della logistica e nei processi legati al Green Deal, ambiti sempre più centrali per l’evoluzione delle infrastrutture e delle supply chain europee.

Come ha dichiarato, infatti, il nostro Managing Partner Giacomo Picchetto: “Circle è una realtà che incarna perfettamente la tesi d’investimento del nostro fondo PIPE focalizzato su eccellenze quotate ad alto tasso di innovazione. Seguiamo con attenzione il percorso del Gruppo e siamo convinti che Circle presenti importanti prospettive di crescita, grazie a un posizionamento distintivo nella digitalizzazione della logistica e del Green Deal. In qualità di partner finanziario strategico, siamo lieti di poter supportare l’accelerazione del piano approvato da Circle, contribuendo a un progetto che coniuga solidità industriale e visione tecnologica d’avanguardia.”

Un passo che rafforza il nostro impegno nel sostenere imprese capaci di trasformare l’innovazione in infrastruttura concreta per il futuro dell’economia.

[https://lnkd.in/dXSrtV69](https://lnkd.in/dXSrtV69)

# Contents: Qatar Makes First Italian Investment in Digital Marketing Scale-up with 7M Funding Round

"The funding round for Contents – marking the first entry into Italy of a sovereign wealth fund like the Qatar Development Bank – represents a turning point for our innovation ecosystem. It confirms that the Italian market can attract global capital toward technological projects capable of meeting international competitive challenges.

Our decision to subscribe to part of the $7 million extension was driven not only by financial expectations, but by the conviction that AI platforms like Contents represent an innovation segment with real scaling potential that extends far beyond national borders. At a time when digitalization and artificial intelligence are becoming fundamental levers for the competitiveness of European businesses, the ability to build bridges between technological ecosystems and international capital is an essential component for long-term development."

[Simone Cremonini](https://www.linkedin.com/in/cremonini/), Managing Partner

[https://lnkd.in/ddNSDWFp](https://lnkd.in/ddNSDWFp)

## Report An Issue

1. [Home](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en)
3. Report An Issue

The following summary outlines the procedures adopted by Alkemia SGR S.p.A. for the handling of complaints.

The Company aims to address and resolve complaints in a manner that is efficient, effective, and consistent with principles of professionalism and fairness

Please note that a Complaint may be submitted through the following channels:

- In the event of dissatisfaction with the collective asset management and/or investment services provided by Alkemia SGR S.p.A.;
- In relation to the conduct of employees and/or external collaborators, or in the event of an omission or harm/discomfort suffered, possibly followed by a compensation claim;
- due to malfunctions of IT systems, including websites and mobile applications, in terms of accessibility.

The complaint must include:

- the identifying details of the complainant (including full name, tax identification number, and address), as well as, where applicable, the identifying details of any authorized representative submitting the complaint on behalf of the complainant, accompanied by a copy of the relevant authorization or power of attorney;
- Identification documents of the complainant and, where applicable, of the authorized representative submitting the complaint;
- the factual and legal grounds underpinning the complaint;
- the signature of the complainant or authorized representative.

## How to Submit a Complaint to the SGR

Submit a Complaint via:

- By mail or hand delivery to Alkemia SGR S.p.A.– Piazza Cavour 4 – 35122 Padua;
- Via certified email (PEC) to [_alkemia@pec.alkemiacapital.it_](mailto:alkemia@pec.alkemiacapital.it) (attaching a PDF copy of the identity document);

Alkemia SGR will provide a written response promptly and, in any case, within 60 days

## Legal Remedies

In the event that you are not satisfied with the response provided by the SGR, or have not received a response, please be advised that under applicable law you are entitled to refer the matter to the following authorities:

**Financial Disputes Arbitration Board (ACF)**

An entity established within Consob by resolution no. 19602 dated 4 May 2016, published in the Official Gazette of the Italian Republic no. 116 on 19 May 2016, responsible for resolving disputes between retail investors and intermediaries regarding investment services and activities, particularly concerning the SGR’s compliance with obligations of diligence, fairness, information, and transparency imposed by applicable regulations when providing collective asset management services.

It is possible to refer disputes to the ACF involving claims for amounts less than five hundred thousand euros, provided that no other out-of-court dispute resolution procedures are pending regarding the same facts, or that a prior complaint was submitted to the intermediary who either provided an unsatisfactory response or failed to respond within 60 days following the complaint submission.

The right to refer disputes to the Arbitration Board cannot be waived by the investor and remains exercisable at all times, even in the presence of contractual clauses assigning dispute resolution to other out-of-court bodies.

The submission of the appeal takes place online through the ACF website ( [www.acf.consob.it](https://www.acf.consob.it/)), to which the Company has adhered through the trade association Assogestioni. Registration on the site is required, and once credentials are obtained, users can access the reserved area and submit the appeal. For further information, please refer to the website [www.acf.consob.it](https://www.acf.consob.it/).

Before initiating legal action, please note that it is mandatory to attempt to reach an amicable agreement and to undergo the ‘mediation attempt’ through the aforementioned ACF. Finally, we remind you that, for the purposes of fulfilling the mandatory mediation attempt, it is also possible to contact other mediation bodies registered in the specific Register of the Ministry of Justice. The list of mediation bodies is available on the website [www.giustizia.it](https://www.giustizia.it/).

**Online Dispute Resolution – ODR**

In implementation of EU Regulation No. 524/2013 of 21 May 2013, the platform established by the European Union for the out-of-court resolution of disputes related to products or services sold online (Online Dispute Resolution – ODR) is operational. The following [link](https://webgate.ec.europa.eu/odr/main/?event=main.home.show&lng=IT) provides access to the platform.

## Convivio S.p.A

1. [Home](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en)
3. [Funds](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en/fondi/)
5. Convivio S.p.A

![](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/S3726_CONVIVIO_LOGO_IT-1.jpg)

- **Anno acquisizione:** 2025

- **Investment Type:** Private Equity

Through its fund Alkemia Food Excellence I, Alkemia Capital has promoted the creation of Convivio S.p.A., a new Italian operating holding.
The goal is to establish a leading hub in the fresh pasta and premium gastronomy sector by consolidating the best Made in Italy producers to compete on global markets.
With an equity investment, the initiative aims to bring together centers of excellence, enhance expertise, promote innovation, and preserve the heritage of Italian culinary quality worldwide.

In this first phase, Alkemia has acquired 100% of five leading regional companies: Valsugana Sapori, Parmachef, Casanova Food, Pastificio Cecchin and Poggiolini
— together generating approximately €27 million in revenue.

Alkemia’s strategy is to support Convivio in doubling the group’s size, aiming to reach €100 million in revenue within five years. The founding families and long-standing managers will remain at the helm, ensuring continuity and a strong connection to both territory and tradition.

## General information

Please carefully read this important information before entering this website. It contains legal and regulatory notices relevant to the information contained in this website.

By proceeding, please note that this website is for Italian Professional Investors only.

You should not use this site if you do not fall within this category. You should not rely on the views and information on the site when making investment decisions. The information contained in this website is not intended as an offer or solicitation for the purchase or sale of any financial instrument. It is intended for, and is relevant to, recipients in Italy only and should not be relied upon by persons of any other jurisdiction.

Nothing in this site should be construed as being personal financial advice. Alkemia SGR S.p.A. (“Alkemia”) does not offer investment advice.

The content of this website has been prepared by Alkemia on the basis of information sources and analysis believed to be reliable as at either the time such content was posted in the website or otherwise at the date disclosed. Views and opinions are Alkemia’s only and may change.

Under no circumstances should any part of this website be construed as an offering or solicitation of any offer, and any investment in the products referred to on this website should only be made on the basis of the Fund’s Prospectus. Any reference to individual investments should not be taken as a recommendation to buy or sell. Any performance reports should be read in conjunction with the full text and definitions of the Prospectus. To the fullest extent permitted by law, Alkemia accepts no liability for any loss or damage which may arise from the access to, use of, or reliance on the content of or information contained on, this website.

Otherwise than as specifically set out, the information on this website must in no circumstances be copied, reproduced or redistributed in whole or in part. You may download or print copies of some of the documentation contained on this website for your own private use only, provided that you do not change any copyright, trademark or other proprietary notices. All intellectual and other property information contained in this website shall continue to be held by us and no rights of any kind in it shall pass to you. This website is reserved exclusively for non-US persons and should not be accessed by any person in the United States.

## Past performance information

Past performance is not a guide to future performance and may not be repeated. The value of shares can go down as well as up and is not guaranteed. Changes in rates of exchange may also cause the value of shares to fluctuate. Because of this, an investor is not certain to make a profit on an investment and may lose money.

## Important documents

The information contained herein is not intended to provide, and should not be relied upon for accounting, legal or tax advice or investment recommendations. You should consult your tax, legal, accounting or other advisors about the issues discussed herein. A potential investor expressing an interest to invest in the transaction will be provided with a prospectus, a KIID and subscription agreement (together, the “Fund Documents”) for the investment and an opportunity to review the documentation relating to the investment. Prospective investors must review the Fund Documents, including the risk factors, before making a decision to invest and should rely only on the information contained in the Fund Documents in making their investment decision.

## Links to other Web Sites:

On this web site you may be offered links to other non-Alkemia web sites. These links are provided only as convenience. Alkemia does not accept any responsibility for the content of those web sites or your use or inability to use such web sites, the owners of which do not necessarily have any link, commercial or otherwise, with Alkemia. The inclusion of any link does not imply affiliation, sponsorship, endorsement, verification or monitoring or approval by Alkemia of any information contained in any non-Alkemia web site.

## Use of cookies

Alkemia may obtain information about your general internet usage by using a cookie file which is stored on the hard drive of your computer, for the purposes of systems administration and statistical analysis. Cookies contain information that is transferred to your computer’s hard drive and help Alkemia to improve this Website and to deliver a better and more personalised service to you, including by storing information about your preferences and to recognise you when you return to this Website. You may refuse to accept cookies by activating the setting on your browser which allows you to refuse the setting of cookies. However, if you select this setting you may be unable to access certain parts of this Website. Unless you have adjusted your browser setting so that it will refuse cookies, Alkemia’ system will issue cookies when you log on to this Website.

## Data protection

See the Alkemia Privacy Statement relating to the collection and use of your personal information. Personal information provided by you will be held in confidence by Alkemia and will not be passed on by Alkemia to other product or service companies except as permitted by the important information or the Alkemia Privacy Statement.

## Whistleblowing

1. [Home](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en)
3. Whistleblowing

Alkemia SGR is committed to upholding the highest standards of ethics, integrity and transparency.
In line with this commitment, the Company has implemented a Whistleblowing Policy designed to provide employees, business partners, members of corporate bodies and other relevant stakeholders with a secure, confidential and independent reporting channel for raising concerns regarding suspected misconduct or breaches of applicable laws and regulations, including those related to anti-money laundering, counter-terrorist financing and market abuse.

### Whistleblower Protection

Reports may also be submitted on an anonymous basis and are handled through autonomous and independent channels, in order to ensure the confidentiality of the whistleblower’s identity and of the information reported.
Applicable legislation provides protection to individuals who report concerns in good faith against any form of retaliation or discrimination, including, by way of example, suspension, demotion, dismissal or other punitive measures.

### How to Report

Internal reports can be submitted:

- via the dedicated IT platform [http://whistleblowing.alkemiacapital.com/](http://whistleblowing.alkemiacapital.com/) (preferred channel);
- or by mail, in a sealed envelope, addressed to:
Comply Consulting S.r.l.
Corso Sempione 50, 20154 Milan (MI)
Attn: Whistleblowing Procedure Officer

The Whistleblowing Procedure Officer is Dr. Massimiliano Marinelli, legal representative of the external consulting firm appointed for the Compliance Function.
If the report concerns the Officer, it is possible to contact directly the Chairman of the Board of Statutory Auditors (email: ctavormina@studiotavormina.com
).

### External channels

In addition to internal channels, reports can also be submitted to the Competent Authorities:

- Consob – for violations of the TUF and EU regulations on investment services: [www.consob.it/web/area-pubblica/whistleblowing-ricezione-segnalazioni](https://www.consob.it/web/area-pubblica/wistleblowing-ricezione-segnalazioni)
- National Anti-Corruption Authority (ANAC) – [www.anticorruzione.it](https://www.anticorruzione.it/-/whistleblowing)

### Useful Documents

- Download the full Whistleblowing Procedure
- [Access the web application to submit a confidential report](http://whistleblowing.alkemiacapital.com/)

## Cookie Policy (UE)

1. [Home](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en)
3. Cookie Policy (UE)

_This Cookie Policy was last updated on 13/03/2025 and applies to citizens and legal permanent residents of the European Economic Area and Switzerland._

## 1\. Introduction

Our website, [https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en) (hereinafter: "the website") uses cookies and other related technologies (for convenience all technologies are referred to as "cookies"). Cookies are also placed by third parties we have engaged. In the document below we inform you about the use of cookies on our website.

## 2\. What are cookies?

A cookie is a small simple file that is sent along with pages of this website and stored by your browser on the hard drive of your computer or another device. The information stored therein may be returned to our servers or to the servers of the relevant third parties during a subsequent visit.

## 3\. What are scripts?

A script is a piece of program code that is used to make our website function properly and interactively. This code is executed on our server or on your device.

## 4\. What is a web beacon?

A web beacon (or a pixel tag) is a small, invisible piece of text or image on a website that is used to monitor traffic on a website. In order to do this, various data about you is stored using web beacons.

## 5\. Cookies

5.1 Technical or functional cookies

Some cookies ensure that certain parts of the website work properly and that your user preferences remain known. By placing functional cookies, we make it easier for you to visit our website. This way, you do not need to repeatedly enter the same information when visiting our website and, for example, the items remain in your shopping cart until you have paid. We may place these cookies without your consent.

5.2 Statistics cookies

We use statistics cookies to optimize the website experience for our users. With these statistics cookies we get insights in the usage of our website. We ask your permission to place statistics cookies.

5.3 Marketing/Tracking cookies

Marketing/Tracking cookies are cookies or any other form of local storage, used to create user profiles to display advertising or to track the user on this website or across several websites for similar marketing purposes.

5.4 Social media

On our website, we have included content from Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, WhatsApp, Instagram and TikTok to promote web pages (e.g. “like”, “pin”) or share (e.g. “tweet”) on social networks like Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, WhatsApp, Instagram and TikTok. This content is embedded with code derived from Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, WhatsApp, Instagram and TikTok and places cookies. This content might store and process certain information for personalized advertising.

Please read the privacy statement of these social networks (which can change regularly) to read what they do with your (personal) data which they process using these cookies. The data that is retrieved is anonymized as much as possible. Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, WhatsApp, Instagram and TikTok are located in the United States.

## 7\. Consent

When you visit our website for the first time, we will show you a pop-up with an explanation about cookies. As soon as you click on "Accetta selezionati", you consent to us using the categories of cookies and plug-ins you selected in the pop-up, as described in this Cookie Policy. You can disable the use of cookies via your browser, but please note that our website may no longer work properly.

7.1 Manage your consent settings

You have loaded the Cookie Policy without javascript support. On AMP, you can use the manage consent button on the bottom of the page.

## 8\. Enabling/disabling and deleting cookies

You can use your internet browser to automatically or manually delete cookies. You can also specify that certain cookies may not be placed. Another option is to change the settings of your internet browser so that you receive a message each time a cookie is placed. For more information about these options, please refer to the instructions in the Help section of your browser.

Please note that our website may not work properly if all cookies are disabled. If you do delete the cookies in your browser, they will be placed again after your consent when you visit our website again.

## 9\. Your rights with respect to personal data

You have the following rights with respect to your personal data:

- You have the right to know why your personal data is needed, what will happen to it, and how long it will be retained for.
- Right of access: You have the right to access your personal data that is known to us.
- Right to rectification: you have the right to supplement, correct, have deleted or blocked your personal data whenever you wish.
- If you give us your consent to process your data, you have the right to revoke that consent and to have your personal data deleted.
- Right to transfer your data: you have the right to request all your personal data from the controller and transfer it in its entirety to another controller.
- Right to object: you may object to the processing of your data. We comply with this, unless there are justified grounds for processing.

To exercise these rights, please contact us. Please refer to the contact details at the bottom of this Cookie Policy. If you have a complaint about how we handle your data, we would like to hear from you, but you also have the right to submit a complaint to the supervisory authority (the Data Protection Authority).

For questions and/or comments about our Cookie Policy and this statement, please contact us by using the following contact details:

## Dichiarazione sulla Privacy (UE)

1. [Home](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en)
3. Dichiarazione sulla Privacy (UE)

_This privacy statement was last updated on 13/03/2025 and applies to citizens and legal permanent residents of the European Economic Area and Switzerland._

In this privacy statement, we explain what we do with the data we obtain about you via [https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en). We recommend you carefully read this statement. In our processing we comply with the requirements of privacy legislation. That means, among other things, that:

- we clearly state the purposes for which we process personal data. We do this by means of this privacy statement;
- we aim to limit our collection of personal data to only the personal data required for legitimate purposes;
- we first request your explicit consent to process your personal data in cases requiring your consent;
- we take appropriate security measures to protect your personal data and also require this from parties that process personal data on our behalf;
- we respect your right to access your personal data or have it corrected or deleted, at your request.

If you have any questions, or want to know exactly what data we keep of you, please contact us.

## 1\. Sharing with other parties

We only share this data with processors and with other third parties for which consent must be obtained.

Processors

**Name:** Google

**Country:** Irlanda

**Purpose:** Analisi Statistiche

## 2\. Cookies

Our website uses cookies. For more information about cookies, please refer to our [Cookie Policy](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en/cookie-policy-ue/).

## 3\. Disclosure practices

We disclose personal information if we are required by law or by a court order, in response to a law enforcement agency, to the extent permitted under other provisions of law, to provide information, or for an investigation on a matter related to public safety.

If our website or organisation is taken over, sold, or involved in a merger or acquisition, your details may be disclosed to our advisers and any prospective purchasers and will be passed on to the new owners.

We have concluded a data Processing Agreement with Google.

The inclusion of full IP addresses is blocked by us.

## 4\. Security

We are committed to the security of personal data. We take appropriate security measures to limit abuse of and unauthorized access to personal data. This ensures that only the necessary persons have access to your data, that access to the data is protected, and that our security measures are regularly reviewed.

## 5\. Third-party websites

This privacy statement does not apply to third-party websites connected by links on our website. We cannot guarantee that these third parties handle your personal data in a reliable or secure manner. We recommend you read the privacy statements of these websites prior to making use of these websites.

## 6\. Amendments to this privacy statement

We reserve the right to make amendments to this privacy statement. It is recommended that you consult this privacy statement regularly in order to be aware of any changes. In addition, we will actively inform you wherever possible.

## 7\. Accessing and modifying your data

If you have any questions or want to know which personal data we have about you, please contact us. You can contact us by using the information below. You have the following rights:

- You have the right to know why your personal data is needed, what will happen to it, and how long it will be retained for.
- Right of access: You have the right to access your personal data that is known to us.
- Right to rectification: you have the right to supplement, correct, have deleted or blocked your personal data whenever you wish.
- If you give us your consent to process your data, you have the right to revoke that consent and to have your personal data deleted.
- Right to transfer your data: you have the right to request all your personal data from the controller and transfer it in its entirety to another controller.
- Right to object: you may object to the processing of your data. We comply with this, unless there are justified grounds for processing.

Please make sure to always clearly state who you are, so that we can be certain that we do not modify or delete any data of the wrong person.

## 8\. Submitting a complaint

If you are not satisfied with the way in which we handle (a complaint about) the processing of your personal data, you have the right to submit a complaint to the Data Protection Authority.

# “We have integrated ESG factors into the core of our governance, driven by the conviction that sustainability and long-term performance are inherently linked.”

_“We have integrated ESG factors into the core of our governance, driven by the conviction that sustainability and long-term performance are inherently linked.”_

"Our CEO and Managing Partner, Luca Maurizio Duranti, in a conversation with Etica.News, explained how Alkemia’s integration of environmental, social, and governance (ESG) factors is not merely a statement of intent. Rather, it is a structured discipline that involves concrete actions across every stage of the investment cycle, from due diligence to portfolio management.

Because we believe that in a constantly changing market, transparency, rigor, and responsibility are indispensable elements for fostering the creation of more resilient and competitive companies—those capable of generating real impact. This approach provides investors with a clear and consistent view of the risks, but also, and above all, of the opportunities to be seized.

[Link Intervista](https://www.eticanews.it/duranti-alkemia-sgr-sullesg-nelle-pmi-contano-processi-dati-e-responsabilita/)

Alkemia Capital-Comunicato Stampa

**Alkemia Capital inaugura una nuova fase di crescita, grazie all’ingresso nel** **capitale di nuovi managing partner ed al lancio di nuovi fondi nei private markets**

_Milano, 4.2.2025 - In un momento significativo per il suo percorso di sviluppo, Alkemia Capital,_ SGR attiva nel private capital con quasi 20 anni di storia, è orgogliosa di annunciare l'ingresso di due nuovi soci, Simone Cremonini e Giacomo Picchetto, che tramite la loro holding hanno completato l’acquisto di una partecipazione rilevante della SGR.

I nuovi partner, già promotori e gestori del fondo di venture capital “Sinergia Venture Fund” (il cui mandato gestorio è stato trasferito in Alkemia), si uniscono ai soci fondatori Luca Duranti, Walter Gaiani e Robert Segatto, portando innovazione e competenze distintive in Alkemia in segmenti dei private markets di sicuro interesse e complementari all’offerta preesistente.

L’apertura del capitale di Alkemia è stata altresì affiancata da altre milestone di rilievo per il supporto alla crescita della società: l’offerta strategica è stata arricchita e rinforzata con l’ingresso del venture capital, l’avvio di un nuovo fondo PIPE (private investments in public equity), e lo sviluppo di nuovi fondi di private equity “tematici”. Il team di gestione è stato potenziato con l’ingresso di 5 professional.

Alkemia è un operatore qualificato che ha già gestito numerosi fondi di private equity e di _mezzanine sia propri che subentrando nel mandato gestorio di fondi complessi: ad esempio nel_ 2023 Alkemia è stata scelta dagli investitori istituzionali per gestire la dismissione delle partecipate del fondo di private equity “Sinergia II”, sostituendo il precedente gestore.

Grazie al nuovo assetto, Alkemia è presente ora su gran parte dei segmenti del private capital, raggiungendo complessivamente circa 200 M€ di Asset Under Management (“AUM”): la SGR oggi è in grado di offrire diverse soluzioni di equity a supporto delle aziende italiane e dei loro progetti di crescita, che si confermano il target di riferimento delle proprie strategie di investimento. Le masse in gestione sono state raccolte sia presso il private wealth (HNWI e _Family Office) sia presso investitori istituzionali italiani ed esteri._

"Con l'ingresso di Simone Cremonini e Giacomo Picchetto, Alkemia Capital si prepara ad _accelerare la sua crescita ed a consolidare ulteriormente la sua presenza sul mercato. Questa_ _evoluzione riflette il nostro impegno a sostenere le PMI italiane nella loro percorso di sviluppo e_ _innovazione, arricchendo il nostro ecosistema di investimento con nuove competenze e visioni",_ afferma Luca Duranti, Amministratore Delegato e managing partner di Alkemia SGR.

“Sono molto felice di annunciare il mio ingresso nel capitale di Alkemia Capital, e di portare il mio _contributo a supporto della crescita di questa realtà mettendo a frutto oltre 20 anni di esperienza_ _manageriale nei settori Telco, Media, Technology. Reputo fondamentale, inter alia, porre una_ _crescente attenzione all’efficienza operativa della nostra SGR anche grazie all’adozione delle più_ _moderne best practice digitali, organizzative e di processo, ponendo una particolare attenzione_ _all’intelligenza artificiale (AI), strumento che rappresenta una tra le principali sfide per tutti gli_ _stakeholder dei private markets.”, dichiara il nuovo managing partner Simone Cremonini, che_ riveste anche il ruolo di Consigliere Delegato della SGR.

“Dopo una lunga carriera negli hedge fund sono felice di portare la mia competenza nel mondo _del private markets. Ritengo che le mie precedenti esperienze, arricchite negli ultimi anni dalla_ _gestione del fondo Sinergia Venture Fund, siano utili per vedere le evoluzioni dei settori di_ _investimento, l’impatto dei cambiamenti dati dagli scenari macroeconomici e delle strutture stesse_ _dei fondi di investimento che nei prossimi anni cambieranno radicalmente nel mondo dei private_ _markets”, dichiara il nuovo managing partner Giacomo Picchetto, che riveste anche il ruolo di_ Consigliere Delegato della SGR.

* * *

Per maggiori informazioni, visitare [www.alkemiacapital.com](http://www.alkemiacapital.com/) o contattare l’Ufficio Stampa: Media Beats Leonardo Valente – [leonardo@mediabeats.i](mailto:leonardo@mediabeats.i) t- 3461390533 Giulia Grandolfo – [giulia.grandolfo@mediabeats.it](mailto:giulia.grandolfo@mediabeats.it) \- 3755610918

# Alkemia at the Monaco International Investment Forum 2025

On **March 13th and 14th, 2025**, the **Alkemia** team participated in the [**Monaco International Investment Forum (MIIF)**](https://www.mcinvestmentforum.com/), held at the prestigious **Yacht Club de Monaco**. The event served as a significant opportunity for dialogue between institutional investors, investment funds, and leading companies in the **private markets** sector, providing a prime environment for networking and sharing innovative investment strategies.

**A hub for networking and financial innovation.**

The **MIIF** brought together leading figures from the financial world, featuring two days of engaging meetings and insightful discussions:

- **13 marzo – Business Networking e Incontri One-to-One**
  - La prima giornata è stata dedicata agli incontri individuali tra investitori, fondi e operatori del settore. Le riunioni, ospitate nella raffinata sala da ballo dello Yacht Club de Monaco, hanno offerto un contesto esclusivo per discutere di nuove opportunità di collaborazione e investimento.
- **14 marzo – Conferenze e approfondimenti di settore**
  - Nella seconda giornata, esperti internazionali e leader del settore hanno tenuto una serie di conferenze sulle tendenze emergenti nei **private markets**. Gli interventi hanno analizzato scenari di mercato, strategie di investimento innovative e l’evoluzione del contesto finanziario globale.

**Alkemia's Approach to Private Markets**

During the event, Alkemia presented its vision and innovative investment solutions, ranging from private equity to venture capital, PIPE, and hybrid capital. The goal is to offer investors diversified and innovative strategies that can adapt to the changing market needs and generate sustainable value in the long term.

**A valuable experience for investors and partners**

Participating in the **Monaco International Investment Forum** was a significant opportunity for **Alkemia** to strengthen relationships with investors and stakeholders, reinforce its presence in the **private markets**, and explore new avenues for growth and collaboration.

# Alkemia Capital starts a new phase of growth: new shareholders and new funds.

At a pivotal moment in its growth journey, **Alkemia Capital** is proud to announce the entry of two new partners, **Simone Cremonini** and **Giacomo Picchetto**, who, through their holding company, have completed the acquisition of a significant stake in the SGR.

The new partners, already founders and managers of the venture capital fund “ **Sinergia Venture Fund**” (whose management mandate has been transferred to Alkemia), join the founding partners Luca Duranti, Walter Gaiani, and Robert Segatto, bringing innovation and distinctive expertise to Alkemia in areas of the _private markets_ that are both highly relevant and complementary to the existing offering.

The opening of Alkemia’s capital was accompanied by several key milestones aimed at supporting the company’s growth. The firm’s strategic offering has been strengthened and expanded with the addition of **_venture capital_**, the launch of a new **PIPE** fund ( _private investments in public equity_), and the development of new “ **_thematic_ private equity**” funds.

The management _team_ has been strengthened with the addition of five new _professionals_.

Thanks to its new structure, Alkemia is now active across most segments of the _private capital_ market, with total _Assets Under Management_ (“AUM”) of approximately €200 million. The firm offers a broad range of equity solutions designed to support Italian companies and their growth plans — which remain the core _target_ of its investment strategies. These assets have been raised from both _private wealth_ (including HNWIs and _Family Offices_) and institutional investors, both in Italy and internationally.

Here is the official [press release](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/12/Alkemia-Capital-Comunicato-Stampa_def-2025-02-05.pdf).

# Alkemia Capital participates in the THF Annual US Stakeholders’ Meeting

We are pleased to announce the participation of our Managing Partner [Simone Cremonini](https://it.linkedin.com/in/cremonini), in the fourth edition of the TIC/THF US Stakeholders’ Meeting on October 16–17 in Washington, D.C.

A key event – promoted by the Transatlantic Harmonic Foundation, led by Andrea Gumina, in collaboration with the Ministry of Enterprises and Made in Italy, the Ministero degli Affari Esteri e della Cooperazione Internazionale, the Conferenza delle Regioni e delle Province autonome, under the patronage of Embassy of Italy in the US – aimed at strengthening economic and technological cooperation between Italy and the United States.

The 2025 edition will focus on the development of the #TransatlanticVenturePlatform, a new initiative designed to strengthen ties between the Italian and U.S. venture capital ecosystems, to foster co-investments in emerging technologies and strategic sectors such as energy, space, advanced manufacturing, biotech, and artificial intelligence.

A unique opportunity to consolidate the dialogue between investors, institutions, and innovation players, and to build transatlantic bridges that can accelerate the growth of high-potential startups and scaleups.

Full program and details here –> https://lnkd.in/ePtUDAay

# Alkemia strengthens its position as a corporate investment boutique

“Una realtà multiasset che investe con successo nelle PMI italiane, partendo da quelle più sensibili all’innovazione e alla sostenibilità, per favorirne la crescita e accompagnarle anche nel delicato passaggio generazionale. Sono le caratteristiche che fanno parte del Dna di [#Alkemia](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Falkemia&trk=public_post-text), SGR indipendente da circa vent’anni attiva nel private capital italiano. Quella che si potrebbe definire una “boutique” degli investimenti corporate che oggi gestisce oltre 200 milioni di euro di asset attraverso fondi di private equity, mezzanino, venture capital e PIPE”. Così QN Economia ha raccontato la nostra SGR, nella quale [Simone Cremonini](https://it.linkedin.com/in/cremonini?trk=public_post-text) and [Giacomo Picchetto](https://it.linkedin.com/in/giacomo-picchetto-535205?trk=public_post-text) si sono aggiunti come azionisti e Managing Partner al fondatore e Amministratore Delegato [Luca Maurizio Duranti](https://it.linkedin.com/in/luca-maurizio-duranti-a76200a4?trk=public_post-text).

# Convivio S.p.A: Launched as Italy’s national hub for fresh pasta and premium ready meals, promoted by Alkemia Capital.

In the Italian agri-food sector—rich in history, traditions, and artisanal know-how, yet still highly fragmented—we recognized the urgency of joining forces. We are convinced that through aggregation it is possible to truly enhance the widespread heritage of [#MadeinItaly](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=httpswww.linkedin.comfeedhashtagmadeinitaly&trk=public_post-text), building stronger, more innovative companies capable of competing on the global stage.

It is from this vision that our thematic fund [#FoodExcellence](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=httpswww.linkedin.comfeedhashtagfoodexcellence&trk=public_post-text), dedicated to Italian [#food](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=httpswww.linkedin.comfeedhashtagfood&trk=public_post-text), was created, together with [CONVIVIO S.p.A.](https://www.linkedin.com/company/convivio-s-p-a?trk=public_post-text), the operational holding company that has already brought together five leading companies in the fresh pasta and ready meals sector: [Valsugana Sapori Srl](https://it.linkedin.com/company/valsuganasapori?trk=public_post-text), [PARMACHEF Srl](https://it.linkedin.com/company/parmachef?trk=public_post-text), [Pasta di Venezia – Casanova Food Srl](https://it.linkedin.com/company/pasta-di-venezia-casanova-food-srl?trk=public_post-text), [#PastificioCecchin](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=httpswww.linkedin.comfeedhashtagpastificiocecchin&trk=public_post-text), and [#Poggiolini](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=httpswww.linkedin.comfeedhashtagpoggiolini&trk=public_post-text).

Convivio’s primary goal is to connect expertise, traditions, and innovation in order to unlock the sector’s full potential and transform it into tangible value. As our CEO & Managing Partner [Luca Maurizio Duranti](https://it.linkedin.com/in/luca-maurizio-duranti-a76200a4?trk=public_post-text) highlighted: “We are not simply aggregating companies; we are investing in the very soul of Italian #MadeinItaly food. Our ambition is to build a center of excellence that enhances the legacy of each company, enabling them to thrive in the global market while celebrating the quality and values that make them unique.”

This is a long-term project, based on solid partnerships and deep respect for tradition, innovation, and consumers. As [Giovanni Panzeri](https://it.linkedin.com/in/giovanni-panzeri-ab95338?trk=public_post-text), General Manager of Convivio, emphasized: “Each company brings its own distinctive know-how, from regional specialties to cutting-edge cooking techniques and solutions for food intolerances. The union of these complementary strengths is the key to approaching the market with solidity. Our mission is to coordinate these resources to ensure the highest quality offering and sustainable growth, while preserving the identity that made them great.”

This is a significant step, yet only the beginning of a journey whose ultimate goal is the creation of a national hub of Italian food excellence.

# Tecno S.p.A. is now listed on the stock exchange

"We are pleased to support [Tecno Group](https://it.linkedin.com/company/tecnogroup-sc?trk=public_post-text\) at this important stage of its development.

Our role as lead investor aligns perfectly with the strategy of our PIPE fund and reflects our strong commitment to supporting Italian entrepreneurial ventures that innovate business models by integrating sustainability, technology, and international scalability.

Over the years, TECNO has proven to be not just a player in the [#ESG](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=httpswww.linkedin.comfeedhashtagesg&trk=public_post-text\) or [#digitaltransformation](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=httpswww.linkedin.comfeedhashtagdigitaltransformation&trk=public_post-text\) space, but a true enabler of change for thousands of companies — helping to build a more competitive and responsible economy.

We firmly believe that the stock market listing marks the beginning of a new phase of growth for the Group, and we are ready to support its management team in achieving all the ambitious goals set for the future."

[Giacomo Picchetto](https://it.linkedin.com/in/giacomo-picchetto-535205?trk=public_post-text) – Managing Partner di [#Alkemia](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Falkemia&trk=public_post-text) SGR

# Alkemia: “Bureaucracy penalizes Italian funds. Innovation requires more courage.”

Alkemia follows a model inspired by Anglo-Saxon best practices: not just capital, but above all operational support, working alongside existing management to fill organizational gaps and accelerate growth — because in Italy, there is often a lack of execution culture. This is where we want to make a difference.
[Giacomo Picchetto](https://it.linkedin.com/in/giacomo-picchetto-535205?trk=public_post-text) and [Simone Cremonini](https://it.linkedin.com/in/cremonini?trk=public_post-text) shared this vision in an interview with [La Stampa](https://it.linkedin.com/company/la-stampa?trk=public_post-text), where they discussed the current financial and macroeconomic landscape in Italy, the challenges facing the market and Alkemia itself, and their perspective on the future of private equity and private markets.

https://lnkd.in/dnQ-CnBR

# Presentation of the 12th Report “Italian Institutional Investors: Members, Assets and Managers for the Year 2024”

On Wednesday, September 10, in the distinguished setting of Palazzo Mezzanotte, our Managing Partner [Giacomo Picchetto](https://it.linkedin.com/in/giacomo-picchetto-535205?trk=public_post-text) will take part in the official presentation of the XII Report “Italian Institutional Investors: Members, Resources and Managers for the Year 2024”, prepared by the Centro Studi e Ricerche [Itinerari Previdenziali](https://it.linkedin.com/company/itinerari-previdenziali?trk=public_post-text).

The Report will provide an authoritative and comprehensive overview of the Italian institutional market and will serve as a platform for discussion on the increasingly strategic role of [#privatemarkets](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=httpswww.linkedin.comfeedhashtagprivatemarket&trk=public_post-text) in investors’ portfolios, highlighting best practices.

We are honored to contribute to this dialogue, which is particularly significant in today’s environment, where resilience, innovation, and the ability to generate sustainable long-term value are of paramount importance.

# What Venture Capital Firms Look For When Investing in Language AI

On the investor stage at [#SlatorCon](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fslatorcon&trk=public_post-text) 2025 — the leading global conference on artificial intelligence and language services promoted by [Slator](https://ch.linkedin.com/company/slator?trk=public_post-text) — our Managing Partner, [Simone Cremonini](https://it.linkedin.com/in/cremonini?trk=public_post-text), illustrated the operating model of [#Alkemia](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Falkemia&trk=public_post-text), underlining how we constantly encourage the companies in our portfolio to think outside the box and evaluate M&A opportunities to support continuous growth. The case history of [Contents](https://uk.linkedin.com/company/contentsdotcom?trk=public_post-text) is emblematic in this sense: In 2021, on the occasion of the Series A round led by Alkemia’s Sinergia Venture Fund, the startup operated with a traditional advertising model based on online dwell time. Today, it is a content orchestration platform that integrates advanced linguistic models to generate texts, audio, video, and animations, optimizing workflows and ensuring consistency with the brand identity. “We liked the skill mix and also the technology that they developed,” – voiced Simone Cremonini on the [#Slatorcom](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fslatorcom&trk=public_post-text) stage telling about [#Contents](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fcontents&trk=public_post-text) – “but we told them: ‘Listen, guys, you have a good mix of team and technologies and solutions. Why don’t you pivot the company and use the money that you want to raise to develop a solution to sell to enterprises?'”

# Alkemia Capital: Two New Partners and Entry into Private Markets. AUM Reaches €200 Million.

2025 is set to be an ambitious and exciting year for [Alkemia Capital](https://it.linkedin.com/company/alkemia-capital?trk=public_post-text), full of new investment projects and a continuously growing team.

We are pleased to officially announce the entry of two new shareholders into our company: [Simone Cremonini](https://it.linkedin.com/in/cremonini?trk=public_post-text) and [Giacomo Picchetto](https://it.linkedin.com/in/giacomo-picchetto-535205?trk=public_post-text) (both already Executive Directors), with whom we aim to accelerate our mission: to offer investors and our portfolio companies the best expertise and growth opportunities.
["With the addition of](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=httpslnkdindZithxEp&urlhash=JVHJ&trk=public_post-text) [Simone Cremonini](https://it.linkedin.com/in/cremonini?trk=public_post-text) and [Giacomo Picchetto](https://it.linkedin.com/in/giacomo-picchetto-535205?trk=public_post-text), [Alkemia Capital](https://it.linkedin.com/company/alkemia-capital?trk=public_post-text) is poised to accelerate its growth and further consolidate its market presence. This evolution reflects our commitment to supporting Italian SMEs on their path toward development and innovation, enriching our investment ecosystem with new expertise and perspectives,"
said [Luca Maurizio Duranti](https://it.linkedin.com/in/luca-maurizio-duranti-a76200a4?trk=public_post-text), CEO and Managing Partner of Alkemia Capital.

"I’m excited to become a shareholder of Alkemia Capital and to contribute over 20 years of experience in the Telco, Media, and Technology sectors. We will further enhance our SGR’s operational efficiency through digital, organizational, and process best practices. Particular focus will be placed on artificial intelligence—a key challenge for the private markets,"
commented [Simone Cremonini](https://it.linkedin.com/in/cremonini?trk=public_post-text), Executive Director and Managing Partner.

"After a long career in hedge funds, I’m pleased to bring my expertise into the private markets arena. I believe my past experiences—particularly in recent years managing the Sinergia Venture Fund—will be valuable in navigating the evolving investment landscape, the impact of macroeconomic trends, and the structural changes in investment funds, which are set to transform significantly in the coming years,"
said [Giacomo Picchetto](https://it.linkedin.com/in/giacomo-picchetto-535205?trk=public_post-text), new Managing Partner and Executive Director of the firm.

https://lnkd.in/dZithxEp

# Pensions and Venture Capital Investment Strategies

This morning, our Managing Partner [Simone Cremonini](https://it.linkedin.com/in/cremonini?trk=public_post-text) and Hassan Metwalley PhD, Chief Information Security Officer & Co-founder of Ermes Browser Security, took part in the conference “Pensions and Investment Strategies in Venture Capital” promoted by Hon. Walter Rizzetto, President of the Public and Private Labor Committee of the Italian Chamber of Deputies.

The event, of fundamental importance for the sector, brought together for the first time legislators such as Federico D’Incà, Maria Teresa Bellucci, and Paolo Tracassini; institutional investors such as Giovanni Maggi and Alberto Oliveti; representatives of the research community such as Stefano Quintarelli; and startups, to discuss investment strategies for Pension Funds, Social Security Funds, and other institutional players.

As our Managing Partner highlighted during his speech:
“#VentureCapital, when it is part of a portfolio strategy where a fund invests in multiple startups and within an institutional investor’s strategy that invests in multiple funds, should not be considered ‘patient capital.’ In these cases, it is an investment asset class capable of generating returns year after year, ensuring the flows required to provide the benefits that institutions must guarantee. Venture capital is not about investing in companies with limited ambitions, but in high-value enterprises – Ermes Browser Security is a perfect example – that, much like the companies in the post-World War II era, can contribute to the country’s economic recovery. To achieve this, however, belief is needed, along with public investments and a favorable legislative framework. The entrepreneurs are here; what is needed are funds and institutional investors capable of actively supporting their growth.”

The event video is available here –> [https://lnkd.in/dZkhCxnC](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Flnkd%2Ein%2FdZkhCxnC&urlhash=dFHs&trk=public_post-text)

# Alkemia Capital Investor Day

In a historical period marked by profound transformations, yesterday we chose to pause, look each other in the eye, and discuss the issues that truly matter: the future of Italian businesses, the role of private capital, and the shared responsibility of generating value that lasts over time. Our first Investor Day was exactly that: an opportunity for listening and vision. A moment to not only present results but also offer a concrete perspective for the future.

As highlighted on stage by President Paolo Benazzo, CEO Luca Maurizio Duranti, and Managing Partners Simone Cremonini and Giacomo Picchetto, at Alkemia we believe that supporting businesses means accompanying them through all stages of their journey: from inception and growth to maturity. For this reason, every day, through our professionals and with various tools, we consistently pursue one direction: creating real, measurable, and sustainable value.

This value is built on the trust of investors and entrepreneurs, and is developed over time, helping companies establish a clear, ambitious, and shared vision for the future. Clear goals, sometimes challenging, that we motivate our partners to achieve and surpass for the company's future.

For us, being an Asset Management Company (SGR) today means not only allocating capital but also asking the right questions, sharing complex decisions, and always pushing a step further. Because this is how capital becomes impact and this is how, together, we build the future.

We would like to thank all the investors, partners, and stakeholders who shared this day with us, and extend a special thanks to Federico Fubini for his insightful analysis of the global context and the deep attention with which he guided the dialogue between our Managing Partners and the audience.

# Milano Finanza ranks Redelfi among the high-growth companies on Euronext Growth Milan.

Redelfi, a portfolio company of our #PIPE fund, has been included in Milano Finanza’s ranking of the 100 fastest-growing Italian companies on Euronext Growth Milan.

This achievement highlights an entrepreneurial path built on innovation, sustainability, and strategic consistency, and represents an important recognition for a company that is making a tangible contribution to the global energy transition through the digitalization of infrastructures and the development of BESS projects.

The journey undertaken so far by Redelfi confirms that investing in the #EnergyTransition today means investing in the future, generating a concrete positive impact for communities and the environment.

Share on social media

## 4Gift

1. [Home](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en)
3. [Funds](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en/fondi/)
5. 4Gift

![4Gift_logo](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/4Gift_logo.avif)

- **Anno acquisizione:** 2021

- **Investment Type:** Venture Capital

4Gift is a technological platform that allows users to send gifts in an innovative and personalized way directly from the e-commerce sites of partner brands. Founded in 2015 by Giorgio Finzi, Francesco Carrozzini, and Alessandra Bruno, it has attracted the interest of major digital players, including **eBay**, which acquired a 10% stake in 2016.

In December 2021, 4Gift closed a Series A investment round led by **Sinergia Venture Fund** to strengthen its team and accelerate its growth trajectory.

The 4Gift solution enriches e-commerce platforms by offering the option of e-gifting, allowing users to purchase gifts, even as a group, and send them digitally to recipients. The recipients can personalize the gift by choosing the size, color, or variant, and decide whether to have it delivered to their home or pick it up in-store.

Active since 2020 on the U.S. e-commerce sites of selected luxury brands, 4Gift meets the growing demand for purchasing **gifts**, which account for over 40% of the global luxury market.

- https://www.4gift.com/

## TXT eSolutions

1. [Home](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en)
3. [Funds](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en/fondi/)
5. TXT eSolutions

![](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/Logo-TXT_colore_RGB-scaled-1-1024x499.webp)

- **Anno acquisizione:** 2023

- **Investment Type:** Private Investment in Public Equity

**TXT e-solutions** is an Italian company specializing in providing software products and strategic solutions that support the digital transformation of processes and products for its client companies. Founded in 1989, it is headquartered in Milan with offices in Italy, France, the United Kingdom, Germany, Switzerland, and the United States. Its offerings serve a variety of sectors, including aerospace, aviation, defense, industrial, government, and fintech.

In December 2023, **Alkemia Capital**, through the **PIPE** (Private Investment in Public Equity) fund, made an investment in TXT, acquiring both its own shares and additional shares from the market. This transaction allowed TXT e-solutions to welcome a strategic financial partner, with the aim of supporting the company's growth in the ICT sector.

TXT e-solutions is listed on the Italian Stock Exchange under the ticker [TXT.MI](https://www.borsaitaliana.it/borsa/azioni/scheda/IT0001454435.html?lang=en), and is included in the FTSE Italia STAR and FTSE Italia Small Cap indices.

The company continues to expand its international presence and develop innovative solutions to support the digitalization of its clients.

- https://www.txtgroup.com/

## Soplaya

1. [Home](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en)
3. [Funds](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en/fondi/)
5. Soplaya

![](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/logo-rosso-1024x263-soplaya.png)

- **Anno acquisizione:** 2023

- **Investment Type:** Venture Capital

**Soplaya** is a B2B marketplace that directly connects chefs and restaurateurs with local producers, eliminating intermediaries and offering a more transparent and efficient supply chain. Through its digital platform, it enables users to order fresh and unique ingredients with a simple click, ensuring fast deliveries within 12-24 hours and savings of up to 20%.

Founded in 2017 and based in Udine, Soplaya aims to make food sourcing more diverse, sustainable, and cost-effective, while supporting local producers in accessing the market. The company is committed to reducing CO₂ emissions and promoting biodiversity by shortening the agri-food supply chain.

In November 2023, Soplaya completed a funding round of **€12.5 million**, of which €11.5 million in equity, led by **Sinergia Venture Fund** (Alkemia Capital) as the lead investor, alongside P101, Azimut, and CDP Venture Capital. This investment aims to strengthen Soplaya’s presence in the Italian market and prepare for expansion into new markets, as well as enhance the application of artificial intelligence in operations and demand forecasting.

- https://soplaya.com/

## Pakelo Motor Oil

1. [Home](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en)
3. [Funds](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en/fondi/)
5. Pakelo Motor Oil

![](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/PAKELO-logo.png)

- **Anno acquisizione:** 2023

- **Investment Type:** Private Equity

Alkemia’s investment in Pakelo represents a significant opportunity to enhance an Italian leader in the high-performance lubricants sector. With a solid tradition dating back to 1930 and a presence in over 40 countries, Pakelo stands out for its innovation, quality, and sustainability. Alkemia aims to support the brand’s international growth, expansion into new markets, and the strengthening of its production capabilities. This investment aligns with the fund's strategy, focused on Italian entrepreneurial excellence with strong growth potential. The goal is to transform Pakelo into a global benchmark player in the specialized lubricants sector.

- https://pakelo.com/it/

## Redelfi Energy

1. [Home](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en)
3. [Funds](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en/fondi/)
5. Redelfi Energy

![](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/redelfi_page-0001-724x1024.jpg)

- **Anno acquisizione:** 2025

- **Investment Type:** Private Investment in Public Equity

Redelfi S.p.A. is an Italian company operating in the energy transition sector, with a strategic focus on the digitalization of energy infrastructure and the development of high-impact projects in the renewable energy space. Founded in 2008 and headquartered in Genoa, Redelfi has established a growing international presence, with operations and initiatives across Europe and the United States—particularly in Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS) and energy communities.

In April 2025, Alkemia Capital, through its PIPE (Private Investment in Public Equity) fund, made a significant investment in Redelfi S.p.A. by participating in a reserved capital increase and acquiring shares on the secondary market. This investment has further strengthened the Company’s capital structure and introduced a strategic financial partner, aimed at supporting Redelfi’s growth and consolidation in the global green energy market.

Redelfi S.p.A. is listed on Euronext Growth Milan—the Borsa Italiana segment dedicated to high-growth small and medium-sized enterprises—under the ticker RDL.MI.

- https://redelfi.com/

## Tecno Group

1. [Home](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en)
3. [Funds](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en/fondi/)
5. Tecno Group

![](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/206ded1d-17b7-4ce7-88a1-25a9364c2984.png)

- **Anno acquisizione:** 2025

- **Investment Type:** Private Investment in Public Equity

Tecno S.p.A. Società Benefit, founded in 1999 and headquartered in Naples, is a leading player in the Twin Transition — digital and sustainable — for Italian SMEs. With over 4,000 clients and a 99% retention rate, the company combines proprietary platforms and strategic consulting to support businesses in their journeys toward digitalization, ESG compliance, and sustainable innovation.

Alkemia Capital chose Tecno for its scalable business model, high share of recurring revenues (57%), and strong growth prospects. This investment strengthens the Fund’s presence in high-potential sectors, such as SaaS platforms, ESG, and digital transformation.
Tecno aims to consolidate its market leadership through Ardite 4.0, an AI-driven platform for ESG analysis, targeted acquisitions, and the expansion of upselling and cross-selling opportunities.
On July 16, 2025, Tecno made its debut on the Euronext Growth Milan market through a sustainable IPO (private placement), at a placement price of €2.50 per share with Euronext Live and Pirola Pennuto Zei & Associati.
This marks the first sustainable IPO on the Euronext Growth Milan segment.

- https://www.tecnoesg.it/

## Izertis S.A.

1. [Home](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en)
3. [Funds](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en/fondi/)
5. Izertis S.A.

![](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Logo-izertis-1024x313.png)

- **Anno acquisizione:** 2026

- **Investment Type:** Private Investment in Public Equity

Izertis S.A. è una società spagnola specializzata nella fornitura di servizi di consulenza tecnologica e trasformazione digitale per il mercato internazionale. Fondata nel 1996, ha ampliato la sua presenza attraverso acquisizioni strategiche in Spagna, Portogallo, Regno Unito, Svizzera e Stati Uniti, consolidando la sua posizione nel settore. La società offre soluzioni che spaziano dall’intelligenza artificiale e cloud computing alla sicurezza informatica e ingegneria del software, supportando aziende di diverse dimensioni nella gestione delle loro infrastrutture e dei processi digitali. Izertis è quotata sul mercato principale (Mercato Continuo) di BME (Bolsas y Mercados Españoles) con il ticker IZER.

Nel gennaio 2026, Izertis ha concluso con successo un collocamento di azioni per un valore complessivo di 54 milioni di euro. Questa operazione strategica, caratterizzata da una domanda pari a 2,3 volte l’offerta, ha visto l’ingresso nel capitale di Alkemia Capital tramite il fondo PIPE, oltre a importanti fondi internazionali come Janus Henderson, Onchena e Anémona Group. L’ingresso di questi nuovi investitori mira a sostenere la forte crescita organica e per linee esterne dell’azienda, fornendo le risorse necessarie per accelerare il raggiungimento degli ambiziosi traguardi previsti dal suo Business Plan 2030.

Izertis continua a investire nell’espansione dei propri servizi e nella crescita organica, mirando a diventare un punto di riferimento nel panorama globale della consulenza tecnologica e della trasformazione digitale.

- https://www.izertis.com/en/

## [Alkemia Capital starts a new phase of growth: new shareholders and new funds.](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en/alkemia-capital-inaugura-una-nuova-fase-di-crescita-nuovi-soci-nel-capitale-e-nuovi-fondi/)

In un momento significativo per il suo percorso di sviluppo, Alkemia Capital è orgogliosa di annunciare l’ingresso di due nuovi soci, Simone Cremonini e Giacomo Picchetto, che tramite la loro holding hanno completato l’acquisto di una partecipazione rilevante della SGR. ## [Convivio S.p.A: Launched as Italy’s national hub for fresh pasta and premium ready meals, promoted by Alkemia Capital.](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en/convivio-s-p-a-nasce-il-polo-nazionale-italiano-per-la-pasta-fresca-e-i-piatti-pronti-deccellenza-promosso-da-alkemia-capital/)

[![](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/WhatsApp-Image-2025-09-09-at-12.26.34-1024x918.jpeg)](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en/convivio-s-p-a-nasce-il-polo-nazionale-italiano-per-la-pasta-fresca-e-i-piatti-pronti-deccellenza-promosso-da-alkemia-capital/)

In un settore come quello agroalimentare italiano, ricco di storie, tradizioni e saperi artigianali ma ancora fortemente frammentato, abbiamo sentito l’urgenza di unire le forze, convinti che attraverso l’aggregazione sia possibile valorizzare davvero il patrimonio diffuso del #MadeinItaly, creando realtà più forti, innovative e realmente capaci di affrontare il mercato globale. È da questa visione \[…\]

## [Alkemia at the Monaco International Investment Forum 2025](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en/alkemia-capital-montecarlo-miif2025/)

[![Monaco International Investment Forum 2025](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Miif2025.jpeg)](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en/alkemia-capital-montecarlo-miif2025/)

Il 13 e 14 marzo 2025, il team di Alkemia ha partecipato al Monaco International Investment Forum (MIIF), tenutosi presso il prestigioso Yacht Club de Monaco. ### Convivio S.p.A

Convivio is the new Italian operating holding company created by Alkemia SGR through the Food Excellence I fund.
The goal of this initiative is to establish a leading industrial hub in the premium fresh pasta and ready-meal sector, bringing together and enhancing the finest Italian regional culinary traditions.

[Convivio S.p.A](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en/fondi/convivio/)

Convivio is the new Italian operating holding company created by Alkemia SGR through the Food Excellence I fund.
The goal of this initiative is to establish a leading industrial hub in the premium fresh pasta and ready-meal sector, bringing together and enhancing the finest Italian regional culinary traditions.

### Convivio S.p.A

Convivio è la nuova holding operativa italiana creata da **Alkemia SGR** attraverso il fondo **Food Excellence I**. L’obiettivo di questa iniziativa è diventare un polo industriale di riferimento nel settore della pasta fresca e dei piatti pronti di alta qualità, unendo e valorizzando le migliori tradizioni regionali italiane.

[Convivio S.p.A](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/fondi/convivio/)

Convivio è la nuova holding operativa italiana creata da **Alkemia SGR** attraverso il fondo **Food Excellence I**. L’obiettivo di questa iniziativa è diventare un polo industriale di riferimento nel settore della pasta fresca e dei piatti pronti di alta qualità, unendo e valorizzando le migliori tradizioni regionali italiane.

- Pasta Fresca & Gastronomia Premium
- 2025
- Private Equity

### Convivio S.p.A

Convivio is the new Italian operating holding company created by Alkemia SGR through the Food Excellence I fund.
The goal of this initiative is to establish a leading industrial hub in the premium fresh pasta and ready-meal sector, bringing together and enhancing the finest Italian regional culinary traditions.

[Convivio S.p.A](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en/fondi/convivio/)

Convivio is the new Italian operating holding company created by Alkemia SGR through the Food Excellence I fund.
The goal of this initiative is to establish a leading industrial hub in the premium fresh pasta and ready-meal sector, bringing together and enhancing the finest Italian regional culinary traditions.

- Fresh Pasta & Premium Gastronomy
- 2025
- Private Equity

- [Details](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en/fondi/convivio/)

### Convivio S.p.A

Convivio è la nuova holding operativa italiana creata da **Alkemia SGR** attraverso il fondo **Food Excellence I**. L’obiettivo di questa iniziativa è diventare un polo industriale di riferimento nel settore della pasta fresca e dei piatti pronti di alta qualità, unendo e valorizzando le migliori tradizioni regionali italiane.

[Convivio S.p.A](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/fondi/convivio/)

Convivio è la nuova holding operativa italiana creata da **Alkemia SGR** attraverso il fondo **Food Excellence I**. L’obiettivo di questa iniziativa è diventare un polo industriale di riferimento nel settore della pasta fresca e dei piatti pronti di alta qualità, unendo e valorizzando le migliori tradizioni regionali italiane.

- Pasta Fresca & Gastronomia Premium
- 2025
- Private Equity

- [Dettagli](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/fondi/convivio/)

### Convivio S.p.A

Convivio è la nuova holding operativa italiana creata da **Alkemia SGR** attraverso il fondo **Food Excellence I**. L’obiettivo di questa iniziativa è diventare un polo industriale di riferimento nel settore della pasta fresca e dei piatti pronti di alta qualità, unendo e valorizzando le migliori tradizioni regionali italiane.

[Convivio S.p.A](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/fondi/convivio/)

Convivio è la nuova holding operativa italiana creata da **Alkemia SGR** attraverso il fondo **Food Excellence I**. L’obiettivo di questa iniziativa è diventare un polo industriale di riferimento nel settore della pasta fresca e dei piatti pronti di alta qualità, unendo e valorizzando le migliori tradizioni regionali italiane.

### Convivio S.p.A

Convivio is the new Italian operating holding company created by Alkemia SGR through the Food Excellence I fund.
The goal of this initiative is to establish a leading industrial hub in the premium fresh pasta and ready-meal sector, bringing together and enhancing the finest Italian regional culinary traditions.

### Convivio S.p.A

Convivio is the new Italian operating holding company created by Alkemia SGR through the Food Excellence I fund.
The goal of this initiative is to establish a leading industrial hub in the premium fresh pasta and ready-meal sector, bringing together and enhancing the finest Italian regional culinary traditions.

[Convivio S.p.A](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en/fondi/convivio/)

Convivio is the new Italian operating holding company created by Alkemia SGR through the Food Excellence I fund.
The goal of this initiative is to establish a leading industrial hub in the premium fresh pasta and ready-meal sector, bringing together and enhancing the finest Italian regional culinary traditions.

- Fresh Pasta & Premium Gastronomy
- 2025
- Private Equity

- [Details](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/en/fondi/convivio/)

![](https://www.alkemiacapital.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/S3726_CONVIVIO_LOGO_IT-1.jpg)

## Latest News

The latest news from our funds and member companies.

Convivio is the new Italian operating holding company created by Alkemia SGR through the Food Excellence I fund.

### Convivio S.p.A

Convivio è la nuova holding operativa italiana creata da **Alkemia SGR** attraverso il fondo **Food Excellence I**. L’obiettivo di questa iniziativa è diventare un polo industriale di riferimento nel settore della pasta fresca e dei piatti pronti di alta qualità, unendo e valorizzando le migliori tradizioni regionali italiane.
